title: The Right Path
lines: You head down the right tunnel. The smell of mildew is strong.
You round a corner and freeze. A massive swarm of rats is blocking the entire tunnel.
They aren't zombified, but they are unnaturally large and intelligent-looking. They bare their teeth, hungry and defensive.

options.desc: Offer them the block of cheese you found
Try to scare them away and push through
Slowly back away to the entrance
